event.description: {CovLStrv2{The API does not have a global security scheme, indicating a default allow-all configuration. Any API operations without an explicit security scheme will allow unauthorized requests.}}
{CovLStrv2{The global security field should contain one or more security schemes, for example `{L}'security':[{L}'OAuth2':['read','write']{R}]{R}`.}}

typePropertiesGroup.longDescription: The API does not have a global security scheme, indicating a default allow-all configuration. Any API operations without an explicit security scheme will allow unauthorized requests.
